description: Implement the :::diagram block in Charter.Core so the Category=DiagramBlock tests pass: extend CharterMarkdown.Describe to classify a :::diagram container (Info=="diagram") to BlockKind.Diagram, and CharterRenderer.Render to emit its Mermaid body as <pre class="mermaid" id="{stable-id}"> carrying the content-derived stable id, INLINING the vendored MermaidResource library + a theme-aware mermaid.initialize/run bootstrap into the rendered document once when >=1 diagram is present (never a CDN link - invariant 1). Register the diagram block's stable id in SourceMap. Do NOT edit the tests.
